title: ‘Out of ideas’: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang dismisses AI job loss fears, blames recent layoffs on lack of ‘imagination’
summary: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang criticized companies laying off workers due to AI, asserting that they lack imagination. He also went on to dismiss fears of AI taking away jobs of humans.&nbsp;

title: OnePlus Nord 6 design, full specifications leaked ahead of launch: here's what to expect
summary: OnePlus is teasing its Nord 6 in India. Ahead of the launch, a leak has revealed that the upcoming phone could feature a 6.78-inch AMOLED display, Snapdragon 8s Gen 4 processor, and a dual camera setup with a 50MP primary lens.&nbsp;

title: A single smartphone notification hijacks your focus for 7 seconds, new study finds
summary: A new study reveals that a single social media notification can disrupt cognitive processing for about 7 seconds. The research indicates that the frequency of notifications, not just screen time, significantly impacts attention disruption during tasks.

title: Want to sideload apps on Android? Google now requires Developer Mode and a 24-hour wait for installing unverified apps
summary: Google has revised its sideloading rules for Android, introducing an 'Advanced Flow' for users to install unverified apps. The new process requires users to enable developer mode and a verification check to prevent coercion from scammers.

title: US takes down ‘cybercrime-as-a-service’ botnets that hijacked over 3 million IoT devices globally
summary: The US Justice Department has dismantled four major botnets responsible for significant DDoS attacks that infected millions of IoT devices globally. These botnets, operating on a 'cybercrime-as-a-service' model, were used by cybercriminals to launch attacks and extort victims for payments.

title: Eid-ul-Fitr 2026: 50 AI prompts to create your viral festive look via Gemini- Check step-by-step guide
summary: Eid-ul-Fitr 2026 is around the corner, and if you are looking to create your own festive look using Gemini AI, here are 50 prompts you can try.

title: ‘Phase of refocus’: OpenAI to merge ChatGPT, Codex, and Atlas into a unified desktop ‘superapp’
summary: OpenAI is merging its AI web browser, ChatGPT, and Codex into a desktop super app. CEO Fidji Simo emphasized focusing on new successful projects while avoiding distractions, as she prepares to oversee the product revamp and enhance AI capabilities for users.

title: OnePlus Nord Buds 4 Pro with 55dB ANC, up to 54-hour battery launched in India at ₹3,999
summary: OnePlus has launched the Nord Buds 4 Pro in India at a price of ₹3,999. The buds come with active noise cancellation, 12mm dynamic drivers, and Bluetooth 6.0. They will be available to buy from March 23 in Radiant Gray and Raven Black colour variants

title: ‘Google will win the AI race’: Elon Musk makes rare admission, claims Grok will win in space
summary: Elon Musk acknowledges that Google will win the AI race in the US, while China will dominate globally and SpaceX will lead in space. His comments follow a discussion on the limitations of Google's Gemini 3.0 AI model.

title: Realme P4 Lite 5G with 6.8-inch 144Hz display and 7,000mAh battery launched in India, price starts at ₹12,999
summary: Realme has launched the P4 Lite 5G, featuring a 7,000mAh battery, 144Hz display, and a 13MP rear camera. Priced starting at ₹12,999, it offers military-grade durability and a 6nm MediaTek processor. Sales begin on March 25 via Flipkart and other outlets.&nbsp;

title: Elon Musk, Demis Hassabis exchange views on AI’s role in scientific discovery

summary: The acquisition of the Zurich-based autonomous robotics startup took place earlier this week, but the terms of the deal have not been disclosed. title: Who is Jasjeet Sekhon? Academic trailblazer who joined Google DeepMind as chief strategy officer
summary: The Bridgewater executive will be responsible for developing strategic initiatives spanning research, commercialisation, and policy at Google’s AI research lab.

title: KT Rama Rao slams Telangana govt over alleged decline of IT jobs in Hyderabad
summary: In a post on X, KTR claimed that the government accepted the decline during the motion of thanks to the Governor's address and in the Deputy Chief Minister Bhatti Vikramarka's speech in the Budget session of the Telangana assembly.

title: Judge for now dismisses lawsuit by Sam Altman's sister accusing OpenAI CEO of sexual abuse
summary: A ​federal judge on Friday dismissed a lawsuit by Sam Altman's sister accusing the billionaire OpenAI chief executive of sexually abusing her more than two decades ago, but said she can try suing under a ‌different legal theory.

title: Roblox to overhaul ad policies, introduce revenue sharing in 2027
summary: Roblox said on Friday it would take a portion ​of revenue from in-game ​brand deals starting next year, as part of a ​broader advertising-policy overhaul designed to draw in more brand dollars and increase creator earnings.

title: Pinterest CEO calls for ban on social media for youth under-16
summary: Pinterest CEO Bill Ready ​called on world leaders to ban social media for youth under 16 in a LinkedIn post on Friday. title: US jury finds Elon Musk misled Twitter shareholders
summary: A federal jury in California found Friday that tech titan Elon Musk misled Twitter shareholders in an effort to drive down the company's share price as he was poised to buy it in a $44 billion deal. The civil complaint accused Musk of driving down Twitter's stock price to gain leverage to renegotiat

title: SoftBank and AEP plan massive Ohio gas-fired AI data center campus
summary: The US ​Department of Energy on Friday announced a partnership between Japan's SoftBank Group and electric utility AEP to build a colossal gas-fired power plant and data center on federal land in Ohio.
